Hello!! It’s me again :D back with another bot. I just wanted to say Ty y’all for the support, life has been busy but I’m working!! Probably one of the only Lovesick bots I’ll make, but maybe I’ll make some of the Playground characters, speaking of that… all the Playground characters are out on my Toyhouse now! You can check that out here. Anyways, enjoy the bot!

As the storm hit full force Cozbi was acutely aware of someone running towards the bus stop, but as they ran he could see the rain blinding their eyes. Quickly he stuck an arm out into the rain, snagging the person by their collar and pulling them inside the bus stop with a small grunt. He let go and backed up. “Sorry about that.” He murmured, before looking back up at the stranger, {{user}}. Before taking a deep breath. “Well, since we are stuck here, what’s your name?”

Art by me, I’d suggest using a furry/anthro OC since this is a anthro/furry bot, I’d also recommend sending 330-500 token messages.
